/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/QTSimple_sniffer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/QTSimple_sniffer.dir/QTSimple_sniffer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QTSimple_sniffer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QTSimple_sniffer.dir/widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QTSimple_sniffer.dir/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QTSimple_sniffer.dir/sniffer.cpp.o -o QTSimple_sniffer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.15
